texto: When I was in the 9th grade, on Halloween night, when you're supposed to go and out and burn your city, my mom made me go to 'Cirque du Soleil.' I was kicking and screaming. This girl came out onstage, and I was instantly mesmerized. I dropped out of school and became obsessed with her. I saw the show, like, 70 times.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Troy Garity: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “When I was in the 9th grade, on Halloween night, when you're supposed to go and out and burn your…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, halloween, school pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
